creator: thierry@FreeBSD.org
text:
Le ven 11 oct 13 à 17:37:34 +0200, Marcus von Appen <mva@FreeBSD.org>
 écrivait :

> Correct in which term? It works that way (reporting ${PREFIX}/include
> through pkg-config) in the upstream package and on every other
> platform. The examples and documentation use libps/pslib.h as include
> directive, not pslib.h. Thus, we can consider it being the intention of
> the upstream author (as it is for X11 - see the output of 'pkg-config
> --cflags x11').
> 
> Unless there is a very good reason to change it (e.g. a majority of
> other projects  expecting it to work differently), I rather would not
> want to move away from the provided default, since the FreeBSD port
> would be the only one behaving different from the rest.

OK, so let's close this PR.

Regards,
-- 
Th. Thomas.
